directive: Implement ability for the agent to display previously attached images back to the operator using the existing filesystem-backed view/display pipeline in the TUI/chat flow.

children.description: Inspect and implement the conversation/model changes needed to preserve and expose attachment file paths for redisplay from prior operator messages, including tests covering selection/export or lookup behavior.
children.label: conversation-model

children.description: Inspect and implement the TUI/tool plumbing that reuses the existing image display/render pipeline to redisplay an attachment from a stored filesystem path, including tests for the trigger path and rendering behavior.
children.label: display-plumbing

plan.rationale: The feature crosses conversation state, segment typing, and TUI display plumbing. Splitting along model vs renderer/trigger boundaries reduces the chance of mixing storage changes with UI command wiring.
